common.footerHelp: Need help with an order? Reply to any of our emails or use the contact form on wordsthatsells.website

login.title: Sign in - Words That Sells
login.checkEmailBody: If {email} is a valid address, a sign-in link is on its way. It works once and expires in 15 minutes.
login.spamNotice: Nothing arriving? Check your spam folder, or go back and try again.
login.welcomeSub: Enter your email — and your password if you've set one in your profile.
login.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty for an email link
login.forgotHint: Forgot your password? Leave the password empty and we'll email you a secure sign-in link — you can set a new password from your profile.
login.autoAccountHint: No account yet? Just enter your email — your account is created automatically. You stay signed in on this device for 30 days.

errors.pageNotFound: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
